metadata.methodology_notes: Data collected from public earnings releases, SEC filings, and investor presentations. PAX data sourced from stage_1b_actions.json and Q4 2025 earnings. HLNE and STEP have March 31 FY; their FQ3 FY2026 (ending Dec 31, 2025) data used for calendar-year alignment. VINP reports in BRL; original currency preserved with USD conversion notes. EQT reports in EUR; original currency preserved. Prior year data collected where available for YoY growth calculations.

currency_conventions.note: Exchange rates are approximate period-end (Dec 31, 2025) and average rates for CY2025. Actual rates may vary slightly.

limitations: FY2025 20-F not yet filed for PAX or VINP (expected April-May 2026)
HLNE and STEP fiscal years end March 31; interim quarterly data used for Dec 31, 2025 alignment
Some FRE figures are annualized from quarterly or YTD data for HLNE and STEP
P10/Ridgepost FRE figures reflect Q4 only for FY2025; full-year FRE not explicitly disclosed
EQT uses Fee-Related EBITDA (not identical to FRE as used by US-listed peers)
VINP FRE definition may differ from US peer definitions
Valuation multiples (P/FRE, EV/FEAUM) are point-in-time and market-dependent
Some metrics (IRR, dry powder, fund size progression) have limited public disclosure
StepStone FRE definition includes advisory fees, making direct comparison with pure-play managers less precise

data_points.source_location: Calculated: EUR 2,283M fee-related revenue / avg FAUM ~EUR 138.5B
data_points.notes: Fee-related revenue (broader than mgmt fees alone) / avg FAUM. EQT's PE/infra focus yields higher fee rates. Avg FAUM = (136+141)/2 = 138.5B.
ADE per share R$4.58. In USD: ~$0.80/share at avg rate 5.7.

data_points.source_location: FQ3 FY2026 earnings; FRE +37% YoY for 9 months
data_points.notes: FRE growth rate for 9-month YTD period. Very strong growth.
FRE grew 19% for full year 2025.
Quarterly FRE +20% YoY; excluding retroactive fees +35%.
Market cap ~$2.26B (Feb 2026). P/FRE = 2,260/202.5 = 11.2x. Below peer median.
Approximate. EV assumed ~equal to market cap for simplicity (limited debt data). 2,260/40,800 * 10,000 = ~55 bps.

notes: Core operating metrics (AUM, FEAUM, FRE, FRE margin, growth rates) have 88-100% coverage
Distributable earnings have inconsistent definitions across firms, limiting comparability (38% coverage)
Dry powder ratio (MET-013), fund size progression (MET-015), and net IRR (MET-016) have 0% coverage - these are selectively disclosed
Valuation multiples (P/FRE, EV/FEAUM) calculated only for PAX as reference; peer valuations require current market data at analysis time
Fee revenue stability (MET-012) only available for PAX and OWL (25% coverage)
VINP has lowest coverage (39%) due to BRL reporting and limited FEAUM disclosure
HLNE and STEP coverage affected by fiscal year mismatch requiring quarterly data approximation

FRE_definitions.PAX: Management fees + fee-related revenues - cash operating expenses. Excludes equity-based comp, realized/unrealized carry, investment income.
FRE_definitions.VINP: Fee Related Earnings as reported in BRL. May include different fee components than US peers.
FRE_definitions.PX: Fee-related earnings as reported. Includes catch-up fees which can be volatile. FRE margin ~47%.
FRE_definitions.HLNE: Modified definition (FQ4 FY2025): excludes equity-based compensation, includes fee-related performance revenues. Prior periods recast.
FRE_definitions.STEP: Adjusted management and advisory fees, net, less adjusted expenses. INCLUDES advisory fees (unlike pure asset managers). Lower margins reflect advisory model.
FRE_definitions.OWL: FRE revenues less FRE operating expenses. High margin (58%+) reflects permanent capital model with minimal fundraising cost.
FRE_definitions.EQT: Reports 'Fee-Related EBITDA' (not FRE). Conceptually similar. EUR 1,194M at 52% margin. May include items US peers exclude.
FRE_definitions.ARES: Management fees + other fee-related income - compensation/benefits - G&A. Excludes equity-based comp. 41.7% margin.

DE_definitions.PAX: After-tax distributable earnings. Includes FRE + realized carry net of carry-related comp + realized investment income - taxes.
DE_definitions.VINP: Adjusted Distributable Earnings (ADE). BRL-denominated. Includes FRE plus performance-related items.
DE_definitions.PX: Uses Adjusted Net Income (ANI), not DE. $0.26/share FY2025.
DE_definitions.OWL: Distributable Earnings. $0.84/share FY2025. Includes FRE + realized carry + investment income.
DE_definitions.ARES: Uses 'After-tax Realized Income'. $1.45/share FY2025. Analogous to DE but with ARES-specific adjustments.
DE_definitions.HLNE: Not consistently reported as a separate line item in public disclosures.
DE_definitions.STEP: Not consistently reported as a separate line item in public disclosures.
DE_definitions.EQT: Does not report DE equivalent. Distributes via dividends (EUR 461M) and buybacks (EUR 296M).
